compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: VPD-based auto speed control, negative pressure regulation, separate day/night speed profiles
compatible_devices.notes: Standard RJ45 cable (RJEC); 2 dedicated EC fan ports (1 intake, 1 exhaust); full 0-10V speed control with RPM feedback

compatible_devices.required_adapter_or_module: GrowControl Cable RJ45-open ends EC or GrowControl Cable RJ45-jack plug
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: VPD-based auto speed control, negative pressure regulation, separate day/night speed profiles
compatible_devices.notes: Fan must be voltage-controlled (0-10V); temperature-controlled EC fans not supported; S&P TD-Silent series may have issues

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: SANlight EVO 4-100, SANlight Q6W Gen2, SANlight STIXX driver
compatible_devices.required_adapter_or_module: SANlight GrowControl Adapter (EVO) or SANlight GrowControl Adapter (Q-Series Gen2)
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Sunrise/sunset gradual dimming, 0-10V precise dimming, day/night scheduling
compatible_devices.notes: EVO 0-10V turns off at 0V signal; socket 4 limited to 600W so for arrays over 600W use 0-10V off signal without Schuko switching

compatible_devices.connector_or_protocol: RJ45 0-10V via LLT M12 push-lock adapter
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Sunrise/sunset gradual dimming, 0-10V precise dimming, day/night scheduling
compatible_devices.notes: 0-10V dimming + sunrise/sunset; socket 4 limited to 600W; for arrays over 600W rely on 0-10V off signal

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Sunrise/sunset gradual dimming, 0-10V/1-10V precise dimming, day/night scheduling
compatible_devices.notes: Socket 4 limited to 600W; for 1-10V fixtures keep load under 600W for Schuko switching

compatible_devices.required_adapter_or_module: GrowControl Cable RJ45-0-10V or custom wiring (pin assignment of luminaire must be known)
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Sunrise/sunset gradual dimming, 0-10V/1-10V precise dimming, day/night scheduling
compatible_devices.notes: 0-10V LEDs supported; 1-10V LEDs require Schuko socket (max 600W per socket) for complete off; all 4 sockets limited to 600W each (1600W combined)

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Day/night timer switching, event timer scheduling
compatible_devices.notes: On/off switching only, no dimming; all sockets max 600W each (1600W combined); limits practical HID use to 400W HPS or smaller with safety margin

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: On/off based on temp/humidity/CO2 setpoints, separate day/night settings
compatible_devices.notes: Standard AC duct fans with running capacitor; on/off only; max 600W per socket (1600W combined); S&P TD-Silent series may have issues; do not connect fans with integrated RPM control

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: VPD-based humidity auto-regulation, separate day/night RH setpoints
compatible_devices.notes: Any 230V humidifier; automatic on/off based on humidity sensor and VPD setpoint; max 600W per socket (1600W combined)

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: VPD-based humidity auto-regulation; dehumidification also achievable via EC exhaust fan speed increase
compatible_devices.notes: Any 230V dehumidifier via Schuko; dehumidification via exhaust fan also supported; max 600W per socket

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: CO2 setpoint auto-regulation (daytime only, requires CarbSense sensor); sensor-less CO2 timer mode also available
compatible_devices.notes: CO2 generators and solenoid valves (230V) via Schuko; CarbSense CO2 sensor (RJ45) for closed-loop control; max 600W per socket

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Temperature setpoint auto-regulation, separate day/night temp setpoints
compatible_devices.notes: Electric heaters via Schuko; all sockets max 600W each (1600W combined); limits heater use to small (<600W) electric heaters; heating mat with RJ45 temp sensor also supported

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Interval timer and event timer-based irrigation scheduling; day/night scheduling
compatible_devices.notes: Any 230V water/irrigation pump via Schuko; timer-based scheduling; max 600W per socket (1600W combined)

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Timer-based scheduling (daily, interval, event timers); day/night mode
compatible_devices.notes: Any 230V circulation fan via Schuko; on/off only; max 600W per socket (1600W combined)

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: CarbSense CO2 sensor, PresSense negative pressure sensor
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: VPD calculation from temp+humidity; CO2 setpoint feedback loop; predictive climate control
compatible_devices.notes: 5 In/Out RJ45 ports (plus 2 dedicated EC fan ports); no multi-sensor support; ports shared between sensors, LED dimming output, and output extender; humidity+temperature sensor included

PowerExtender 4+ is explicitly documented for GrowBase Pro only; standard GrowBase In/Out port supports generic output extender concept but PowerExtender 4+ compatibility not confirmed for non-Pro models
